arguments.query: sentry-sdk Python Flask integration traces_sample_rate setup

turns.content:
1. Sentry Flask Integration - https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/python/integrations/flask/
   pip install sentry-sdk[flask]. Initialize before Flask app creation.
2. Sentry Performance Monitoring - https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/python/tracing/
   Set traces_sample_rate to enable performance monitoring.

Flask Integration

pip install sentry-sdk[flask]

import sentry_sdk

sentry_sdk.init(
    dsn="https://examplePublicKey@o0.ingest.sentry.io/0",
    traces_sample_rate=1.0,  # 1.0 = 100% of transactions
    profiles_sample_rate=1.0,
    environment="production",
    send_default_pii=False,
)

The Flask integration is auto-detected. No need to pass integrations list.

Capture custom errors:
sentry_sdk.capture_exception(e)
sentry_sdk.capture_message("Something happened")

Set user context:
sentry_sdk.set_user({"id": user.id, "email": user.email})

Add breadcrumbs:
sentry_sdk.add_breadcrumb(message="User clicked button", category="ui")

arguments.title: Sentry Flask integration
arguments.content:
pip install sentry-sdk[flask]
sentry_sdk.init(dsn=DSN, traces_sample_rate=0.1, environment='production', send_default_pii=False)
Flask integration auto-detected, no explicit config needed.
Capture: sentry_sdk.capture_exception(e), capture_message(msg)
User context: sentry_sdk.set_user({id, email})
Must init BEFORE creating Flask app.

arguments.message: Sentry integration is straightforward for Flask — it auto-detects the framework. I'll initialize it before the Flask app is created. For production, I'd recommend traces_sample_rate=0.1 (10% of transactions sampled) to avoid high costs. Want me to also add user context setting in the before_request hook?

turns.content: Yes, add user context. Use 0.1 sample rate.

arguments.content:
import os
import sentry_sdk
from flask import Flask, g
from routes import register_routes


def create_app():
    sentry_dsn = os.environ.get('SENTRY_DSN')
    if sentry_dsn:
        sentry_sdk.init(
            dsn=sentry_dsn,
            traces_sample_rate=0.1,
            environment=os.environ.get('ENV', 'development'),
            send_default_pii=False,
        )

    app = Flask(__name__)

    @app.before_request
    def set_sentry_user():
        user = getattr(g, 'current_user', None)
        if user:
            sentry_sdk.set_user({'id': str(user.id), 'email': user.email})

    register_routes(app)
    return app

arguments.summary: Integrated Sentry with Flask. Initializes before app creation with 10% trace sampling. Sets user context in before_request hook. Only activates when SENTRY_DSN env var is set.
arguments.final_answer: Sentry integrated for error tracking and performance monitoring. 10% transaction sampling rate. User context set automatically. Only active when SENTRY_DSN env var is configured.
